AIGP Training Academy

Your Personal Path to AI Governance Certification

Welcome AIGP aspirant!

I'm your AIGP certification trainer, and I'll be your guide on this journey to becoming a Certified AI Governance Professional.

Here's what makes this training different:

  • Bite-sized learning: Each lesson is 5-10 minutes - perfect for busy professionals
  • Progressive unlocking: Master one concept before moving to the next
  • Immediate practice: Quiz after every lesson to reinforce learning
  • Real AIGP simulation: Full-length mock exams that mirror the actual certification
  • Spaced repetition: We'll revisit concepts at optimal intervals for retention

I've trained hundreds of professionals to pass the AIGP exam. Now it's your turn!

⏰ Exam Date: August 31, 2026 ( days from now)
